data.title: 国际服数位周边「Code: BOX - The Shadow Approaching Millennium」
data.summary: [Code: BOX - The Shadow Approaching Millennium Digital Merch Distribution!] To celebrate the update
data.body:
[Code: BOX - The Shadow Approaching Millennium Digital Merch Distribution!]

To celebrate the update of the event story “Code: BOX - The Shadow Approaching Millennium,” we’ve prepared digital goods for you. Decorate your device with these special wallpapers! 🎁

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3022954
